steps.title: Compare Brooks's judgments
steps.content: Brooks found the 2016 version's storytelling very confusing, but she enthusiastically praised the Broadway version's storytelling in 2019. That negative-to-positive shift suggests a major improvement between the two productions.

steps.title: Remove reversed readings
steps.content: Choice B says the 2016 version had fewer problems, and Choice D says the 2019 version was less enjoyable; both reverse Brooks's judgments. Choice C concerns production size, not Brooks's view of the storytelling. The answer is A.
